---
title: "Elad_boruta"
author: "Elad Deiss-Yehiely"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:   
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

##replace root.dir to whereever you have stored the data
knitr::opts_knit$set(
  root.dir = "~/Desktop/Postdoc UCSF/CANOE/Boruta Analysis"
)
setwd(knitr::opts_knit$get("root.dir"))  # sync interactive wd to knit root

```

```{r library loading, include=FALSE}
### MUCH OF THIS SCRIPT IS TAKEN FROM HOLLY STEININGER FROM HER PUBLICATION ###

rpkgs <- c("tidyverse", "data.table", "Boruta", "reshape2", "ggridges")

#Run once per project
#install.packages(rpkgs)

for(package in rpkgs) {
  do.call("library", list(package))
 }

```

```{r data loading, include=FALSE}

#/Users/hsteininger/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/Lynch_lab_Holly_Steininger/Mentorship/Elad/sample_metadata_table.txt

otu_tss_Boruta <- read.delim(
  "otu_abundance_table.txt",
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE,
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) 

metadata_Boruta <- read.delim(
  "sample_metadata_table.txt",
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE,
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

tax_table_Boruta <- as.data.frame(tax_table(phy_tss_sub))


```

## Random Forest Feature Identification

Identify ASV which distinguish chronic_rhinitis_36m_current children. 

###Function

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

#---------------------------------------FUNCTION-------------------------

#Function to aggregate the importance scores across multiple Random Forest runs with different tree numbers.
aggregate_importance_scores <- function(importance_list) {
  do.call(rbind, importance_list)
}

run_boruta <- function(data, target, n_trees, seed, maxRuns, return_model) {
  set.seed(seed)
  stopifnot(nrow(data) == length(target)) #fail if misaligned
  data <- cbind(data, target = target)
  data$target <- as.factor(data$target)

  boruta_result <- Boruta(target ~ ., data = data, doTrace = 0, ntree = n_trees, maxRuns = maxRuns)
  
    if (return_model) {
    return(boruta_result)
  }

  # Get long-form importance history
  imp_hist <- as.data.frame(boruta_result$ImpHistory)
  imp_hist$Iteration <- 1:nrow(imp_hist)
  imp_long <- reshape2::melt(imp_hist, id.vars = "Iteration", variable.name = "Feature", value.name = "Importance")
  imp_long <- imp_long[!is.na(imp_long$Importance), ]

  # Compute z-scores per run
  imp_long_z <- imp_long %>%
    group_by(Iteration) %>%
    mutate(
      meanImp_z = (Importance - mean(Importance, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(Importance, na.rm = TRUE),
      NumTrees = n_trees,
      Seed = seed,
      FeatureType = ifelse(grepl("^shadow", Feature), "Shadow", "Real")
    )

    # Get Boruta decision per feature
  decisions <- attStats(boruta_result)
  decisions$Feature <- rownames(decisions)
  decisions <- decisions[, c("Feature", "decision")]

  imp_long_z <- left_join(imp_long_z, decisions, by = "Feature")

  return(imp_long_z)
}

```

##Prepare data for boruta

```{r}
canoe_phy_sparcc_tss <- transform_sample_counts(canoe_phy_sparcc, function(x) x / sum(x))

phy_age12 <- subset_samples(canoe_phy_sparcc_tss, Age == 12)


otu_tss_Boruta <- as.data.frame(otu_table(phy_age12))
metadata_Boruta <- as.data.frame(sample_data(phy_age12))
tax_table_Boruta <- as.data.frame(tax_table(phy_age12))

data_Boruta <- otu_tss_Boruta
#883 obs of 118 var

### CHOOSE METADATA VARIABLE OF INTEREST HERE ###
target_Boruta <- metadata_Boruta$chronic_rhinitis12m
#logi [1:883]

table(is.na(target_Boruta)) 
#alrighty; 348 of the 883 samples is missing a value in chronic_rhinitis36m_current

stopifnot(identical(rownames(otu_tss_Boruta), rownames(metadata_Boruta)))
#all the rownames match 

#make the target only those with chronic_rhinitis36m_current is not NA
keep <- !is.na(target_Boruta)
otu_filt_Boruta <- otu_tss_Boruta[keep, , drop = FALSE]
target_filt <- target_Boruta[keep]

##check them
sum(is.na(target_filt))   # should be 0
length(target_filt) #535
dim(otu_filt_Boruta) #535 118

data_Boruta <- otu_filt_Boruta
target <- target_filt


```


```{r, run boruta}
# # Define parameters
n_trees_list <- seq(1000, 5000, by = 500)
seeds <- c(11, 145, 224) # do all 3 when de-bugged
maxRuns <- 200

all_importance_scores <- list()

#Run Boruta for each seed
for (seed in seeds) {
  cat("Running Boruta with seed:", seed, "\n")

  # Run Boruta for all tree counts
  importance_list <- lapply(n_trees_list, function(n_trees) {
    cat("  - Running with", n_trees, "trees...\n")
    run_boruta(data = data_Boruta, target = target, n_trees = n_trees, seed = seed, maxRuns = maxRuns, return_model = FALSE)
  })

  # Aggregate importance scores
  combined_scores <- aggregate_importance_scores(importance_list)

  # Add seed annotation
  combined_scores$Seed <- seed  # Track which seed was used

  # Store results
  all_importance_scores[[as.character(seed)]] <- combined_scores
}

all_importance_scores

#Combine results from all seeds into a single data frame
boruta_asv_200_maxruns_chronicRhinitis_12current_12only <- do.call(rbind, all_importance_scores)

#saveRDS(boruta_asv_200_maxruns_chronicRhinitis_12current_12only, file = "~/Desktop/Postdoc UCSF/CANOE/Boruta Analysis/Update_April2026/boruta_asv_200_maxruns_chronicRhinitis_36current_12only")


#boruta_asv_200_maxruns_chronicRhinitis_36current <- readRDS("~/Desktop/Postdoc UCSF/CANOE/Boruta Analysis/Chronic Rhinitis 36m/Elad_boruta_chronicRhinitis36m.Rmd")

# unique(boruta_species_200_maxruns$Feature[boruta_species_200_maxruns$decision == "Confirmed"])
# [1] "Hungatella effluvii"             "Bacteroides cellulosilyticus"    "Parabacteroides merdae"         
# [4] "Enterocloster aldenensis"        "Fusicatenibacter saccharivorans" "Clostridium paraputrificum"     
# [7] NA   

```

###Ridge plot
```{r, plot}
# Add label for FeatureType (Real vs Shadow)
boruta_ridges <- boruta_asv_200_maxruns_chronicRhinitis_12current_12only %>%
  mutate(FeatureType = ifelse(grepl("^shadow", Feature), "Shadow", "Real"))

boruta_ridges_filtered <- boruta_ridges %>%
  filter(FeatureType == "Real" | Feature %in% c("shadowMin", "shadowMean", "shadowMax"))

#Make a shadow max reference line
  # Extract Z-scores for shadowMax only
  shadow_max_zscores <- boruta_asv_200_maxruns_chronicRhinitis_12current_12only %>%
    filter(Feature == "shadowMax") %>%
    pull(meanImp_z)
  
  # Choose a threshold summary:
  shadow_max_median <- median(shadow_max_zscores, na.rm = TRUE)
  shadow_max_95 <- quantile(shadow_max_zscores, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)

# Get feature order by median z-score (ascending or descending) and apply
feature_order <- boruta_ridges_filtered %>%
    filter(is.finite(meanImp_z)) %>%                 # guard against Inf/NaN
    group_by(Feature) %>%
    summarise(Median = median(meanImp_z, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(Median) %>%                               # use arrange(desc(Median)) for highest on top
    pull(Feature)
  
  #Apply as factor levels for plotting
  boruta_ridges_filtered <- boruta_ridges_filtered %>%
    mutate(Feature = factor(Feature, levels = feature_order))

####
# Final plot
Boruta_species_ridge <- ggplot(boruta_ridges_filtered, aes(x = meanImp_z, y = Feature, fill = decision)) +
  geom_density_ridges(scale = 1.5, alpha = 0.8, rel_min_height = 0.01, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Confirmed" = "#FDE725FF", 
    "Rejected" = "grey", 
    "Tentative" = "#31688EFF",
    "Shadow" = "#440154FF"
  ),
  labels = c(
    "Confirmed" = "Confirmed (p < 0.01)",
    "Rejected" = "Rejected (p > 0.99)",
    "Tentative" = "Tentative (p: 0.01–0.99)",
    "Shadow" = "Shadow (min, mean, or max of permuted features)"
  )) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = shadow_max_median, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Z-score Distributions of Real Features vs Shadow Features",
    x = "Z-score",
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Feature Significance"
  ) +
  theme_ridges() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "italic")
  )

Boruta_species_ridge

ggsave("~/Desktop/Postdoc UCSF/CANOE/Boruta Analysis/Update_April2026/boruta_asv_200_maxruns_chronicRhinitis_12current_12only_test.png", plot = Boruta_species_ridge, width = 6, height = 20, units = "in", dpi = "print")

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

asvs_plot <- c("ASV_39","ASV_54","ASV_14","ASV_21","ASV_17","ASV_87","ASV_84")

# metadata from sample_data (sam_sub)
meta_plot <- meta %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  select(SampleID, Subject_ID, Group, chronic_rhinitis36m_current, chronic_rhinitis12m)
  #select(SampleID, Subject_ID, Group, chronic_rhinitis36m_current, chronic_rhinitis12m, clust_sorensen_2)   # <-- change Participant_ID to your actual participant column name

otu_tss_all <- as.data.frame(otu_table(canoe_phy_sparcc_tss))

# abundances (assumes rows = samples, cols = ASVs)
df_plot_Boruta <- otu_tss_all %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  select(SampleID, all_of(asvs_plot)) %>%
  pivot_longer(all_of(asvs_plot), names_to = "ASV", values_to = "RelAbund") %>%
  left_join(meta_plot, by = "SampleID") %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(Group),                  # optionally set levels
    Subject_ID = factor(Subject_ID),
    ASV = factor(ASV, levels = asvs_plot),
    Chronic_Rhinitis_36m = factor(chronic_rhinitis36m_current),
    Chronic_Rhinitis_12m = factor(chronic_rhinitis12m)
    #Trajectory_Sorensen = factor(clust_sorensen_2)
  )

# Optional: enforce correct timepoint order (edit levels to yours)
df_plot_Boruta$Group <- factor(
  df_plot_Boruta$Group,
  levels = c("child - newborn",
             "child - 4 months",
             "child - 12 months"),
  labels = c("Newborn", "4 months", "12 months")
)
df_plot_Boruta$clust_sorensen_2 <- factor(df_plot_Boruta$clust_sorensen_2)



# 3) Violin + participant directionality
ggplot(df_plot_Boruta, aes(x = Group, y = RelAbund)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) +
  geom_jitter(aes(group = Subject_ID),
              width = 0.12, alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
  geom_line(aes(group = Subject_ID,
                color = clust_sorensen_2),
            alpha = 0.4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("1-1" = "#009E73",   # green (teal)
                                "1-2" = "#D55E00")) + # red (vermillion) 
  facet_wrap(~ ASV, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Timepoint (Group)",
       y = "Relative abundance (TSS)",
       color = "Trajectory")

ggplot(df_plot_Boruta, aes(x = Group, y = RelAbund)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) +
  
  # Points colored by trajectory
  geom_jitter(
    aes(group = Subject_ID,
        color = clust_sorensen_2),
    width = 0.12, alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5
  ) +
  
  # Lines NOT colored
  geom_line(
    aes(group = Subject_ID),
    color = "grey90",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("1-1" = "#009E73",
                                "1-2" = "#D55E00")) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ ASV, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Timepoint (Group)",
    y = "Relative abundance (TSS)",
    color = "Trajectory"
  )



#3b) Trying to have side-by-side violin plots.
df_asv32 <- df_plot_Boruta %>%
  filter(ASV == "ASV_15") %>%
  mutate(clust_sorensen_2 = factor(clust_sorensen_2, levels = c("1-1","1-2"))) %>%
  mutate(Chronic_Rhinitis_12m = factor(Chronic_Rhinitis_12m, levels = c(TRUE, FALSE)))

ggplot(
  df_asv32,
  aes(x = Group,
      y = RelAbund,          # pseudocount for zeros
      fill = Chronic_Rhinitis_12m)
) +
  geom_violin(
    trim = FALSE,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    aes(color = Chronic_Rhinitis_12m,
        group = interaction(Subject_ID, Chronic_Rhinitis_12m)),
    position = position_jitterdodge(
      jitter.width = 0.12,
      dodge.width  = 0.8
    ),
    alpha = 0.6,
    size = 1.4
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "TRUE"  = alpha("#D41159", 0.5),
    "FALSE" = alpha("#006400", 0.5))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#D41159",
                                "FALSE" = "#006400")) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  annotation_logticks(sides = "l") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Timepoint",
    y = "Relative abundance",
    title = expression("Longitudinal Relative Abundance of" ~ italic("Moraxella") ~ "_57"),
    fill  = "Rhinitis at 12 months",
    color = "Rhinitis at 12 months"
  )


#4) Check directionality of those with and without ASV of interest in chronic rhinitis
df_plot_Boruta <- df_plot_Boruta %>%
  filter(!is.na(Chronic_Rhinitis_12m))

all_Boruta_plot <- 
  ggplot(df_plot_Boruta %>% filter(ASV == "ASV_57"),
       aes(x = chronic_rhinitis12m,
           y = RelAbund)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_bw()

all_Boruta_plot

wilcox.test(RelAbund ~ Chronic_Rhinitis_12m,
            data = df_plot_Boruta %>% 
              filter(ASV == "ASV_57",
                     Group == "12 months"))

tmp_0 <- df_plot_Boruta %>%
  filter(ASV == "ASV_83") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Chronic_Rhinitis_36m)) %>%
  filter(Group == "12 months") %>%
  mutate(RelAbund_log = log10(RelAbund + 1e-6))

glmer_log <- glmer(Chronic_Rhinitis_36m ~ RelAbund_log + (1|Subject_ID),
               data = tmp_0,
               family = binomial)

summary(glmer_log)

tmp2 <- tmp %>%
  mutate(present = RelAbund > 0)

fisher.test(table(tmp2$present, tmp2$Chronic_Rhinitis_36m))
```

```{r}
df_asv25 <- df_plot_Boruta %>%
  filter(ASV == "ASV_32") %>%
  mutate(clust_sorensen_2 = factor(clust_sorensen_2,
                                   levels = c("1-1","1-2"))) %>%
  mutate(Chronic_Rhinitis_12m = factor(Chronic_Rhinitis_12m, levels = c(TRUE, FALSE)))

wilcox_results <- df_asv25 %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  wilcox_test(RelAbund ~ Chronic_Rhinitis_12m) %>%
  adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%        # optional FDR correction
  add_significance()

wilcox_results



#Start here
df_asv83_nb <- df_plot_Boruta %>%
  filter(
    ASV == "ASV_83",
    Group == "12 months"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    present = RelAbund > 0,
    Chronic_Rhinitis_12m = factor(Chronic_Rhinitis_12m)
  )

df_positive <- df_asv83_nb %>%
  filter(present)

prev_model <- glm(
  present ~ Chronic_Rhinitis_12m,
  data = df_asv83_nb,
  family = binomial
)

summary(prev_model)

exp(cbind(
  OR = coef(prev_model),
  confint(prev_model)
))



abund_model <- lm(
  RelAbund ~ Chronic_Rhinitis_12m,
  data = df_positive
)

summary(abund_model)




df_plot_Boruta %>%
  filter(
    ASV == "ASV_83",
    Group == "12 months",              # or Timepoint if that is your column name
    Chronic_Rhinitis_12m == TRUE
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(RelAbund, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(RelAbund, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(RelAbund, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(RelAbund, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(RelAbund, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(RelAbund, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```
```{r}
asvs_interest <- c("ASV_335","ASV_57","ASV_25","ASV_15","ASV_83","ASV_73","ASV_169","ASV_32")

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

asv_to_genus <- c(
  "ASV_335" = "Dermacoccaceae_335",
  "ASV_57"  = "Moraxella_57",
  "ASV_15"  = "Moraxella_15",
  "ASV_25"  = "Moraxella_25",
  "ASV_83"  = "Streptococcus_83",
  "ASV_73"  = "Lactococcus_73",
  "ASV_169" = "Actinobacteria_169",
  "ASV_32"  = "Streptococcus_32"
)

timepoints_interest <- c("Newborn", "4 months", "12 months")

prev_df_boruta <- df_plot_Boruta %>%
  filter(
    ASV %in% names(asv_to_genus),
    Group %in% timepoints_interest
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    present = RelAbund > 0,

    # ✅ robust conversion from factor/logical/character to TRUE/FALSE factor
    Rhinitis = as.character(Chronic_Rhinitis_12m),
    Rhinitis = if_else(Rhinitis %in% c("TRUE", "True", "T", "1", "Yes", "YES"), "TRUE", "FALSE"),
    Rhinitis = factor(Rhinitis, levels = c("TRUE", "FALSE")),

    Group = factor(Group, levels = timepoints_interest),
    ASV = factor(ASV, levels = rev(names(asv_to_genus)))  # ASV_335 at top
  ) %>%
  group_by(ASV, Group, Rhinitis) %>%
  summarise(
    prevalence = mean(present, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Time_Rhinitis = interaction(Group, Rhinitis, sep = " | "),
    # ✅ levels must match "TRUE"/"FALSE"
    Time_Rhinitis = factor(
      Time_Rhinitis,
      levels = as.vector(outer(timepoints_interest, c("TRUE","FALSE"), paste, sep = " | "))
    )
  )

prev_df_boruta <- prev_df_boruta %>%
  mutate(Rhinitis = recode(Rhinitis, "TRUE" = "True", "FALSE" = "False"))
time_rh_levels <- as.vector(t(outer(timepoints_interest, c("True","False"), paste, sep = " | ")))
prev_df_boruta <- prev_df_boruta %>%
  mutate(
    Time_Rhinitis = interaction(Group, Rhinitis, sep = " | "),
    Time_Rhinitis = factor(Time_Rhinitis, levels = time_rh_levels)
  )

# Plot (same as before)
ggplot(prev_df_boruta, aes(x = Time_Rhinitis, y = ASV, fill = prevalence)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(prevalence, accuracy = 1)), size = 3) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) asv_to_genus[x]) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#D41159", limits = c(0, 1), name = "Prevalence") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(
    x = "Timepoint | Chronic_Rhinitis_12m",
    y = "Genus",
    title = "ASV prevalence across timepoints, split by rhinitis status"
  )








# --- Inputs ---
asv_to_genus <- c(
  "ASV_39" = "Moraxella_39",
  "ASV_54"  = "Streptococcus_54",
  "ASV_14"  = "Moraxella_14",
  "ASV_21"  = "Moraxella_21",
  "ASV_17"  = "Streptococcus_17",
  "ASV_87"  = "Corynebacterium_87",
  "ASV_84" = "Veillonella_84"
)

timepoints_interest <- c("child - newborn", "child - 4 months", "child - 12 months")

# --- Prep data (make Rhinitis robust even if factor) ---
df_prev <- df_plot_Boruta %>%
  filter(
    ASV %in% names(asv_to_genus),
    Group %in% timepoints_interest
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    present = RelAbund > 0,
    # robust: handles factor/logical/character encodings
    Rhinitis = as.character(Chronic_Rhinitis_12m),
    Rhinitis = if_else(Rhinitis %in% c("TRUE","True","T","1","Yes","YES"), "TRUE", "FALSE"),
    Rhinitis = factor(Rhinitis, levels = c("TRUE","FALSE")),
    Group    = factor(Group, levels = timepoints_interest),
    ASV      = factor(ASV, levels = rev(names(asv_to_genus)))  # ASV_335 on top
  )

# --- 1) Prevalence for heatmap tiles ---
prev_df <- df_prev %>%
  group_by(ASV, Group, Rhinitis) %>%
  summarise(
    prevalence = mean(present, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Time_Rhinitis = interaction(Group, Rhinitis, sep = " | "),
    # order: Newborn|TRUE, Newborn|FALSE, 3m|TRUE, 3m|FALSE, ...
    Time_Rhinitis = factor(
      Time_Rhinitis,
      levels = as.vector(t(outer(timepoints_interest, c("TRUE","FALSE"), paste, sep = " | ")))
    )
  )

# --- 2) Chi-square / Fisher per ASV x timepoint (TRUE vs FALSE) ---
chi_df <- df_prev %>%
  group_by(ASV, Group) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    tab <- table(.x$present, .x$Rhinitis)

    # ensure 2x2 (present/absent x TRUE/FALSE)
    if (!all(dim(tab) == c(2, 2))) {
      return(tibble(test = NA_character_, p_value = NA_real_))
    }

    chi <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE))

    if (any(chi$expected < 5)) {
      ft <- fisher.test(tab)
      tibble(test = "Fisher", p_value = ft$p.value)
    } else {
      tibble(test = "Chi-squared", p_value = chi$p.value)
    }
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),
    stars = case_when(
      is.na(p_adj)   ~ "",
      p_adj < 0.001  ~ "***",
      p_adj < 0.01   ~ "**",
      p_adj < 0.1   ~ "*",
      TRUE           ~ ""
    ),
    # put star on the TRUE tile for that timepoint
    Rhinitis = factor("TRUE", levels = c("TRUE","FALSE")),
    Time_Rhinitis = interaction(Group, Rhinitis, sep = " | "),
    Time_Rhinitis = factor(
      Time_Rhinitis,
      levels = as.vector(t(outer(timepoints_interest, c("TRUE","FALSE"), paste, sep = " | ")))
    )
  )

# --- 3) Merge stars into a plotting layer (no need to merge into prev_df) ---
ggplot(prev_df, aes(x = Time_Rhinitis, y = ASV, fill = prevalence)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +

  # ⭐ Stars centered inside TRUE tiles
  geom_text(
    data = chi_df,
    aes(x = Time_Rhinitis, y = ASV, label = stars),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  scale_y_discrete(labels = function(x) asv_to_genus[x]) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "white",
    high = "#D41159",
    limits = c(0, 1),
    name = "Prevalence"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Timepoint | Rhinitis_12m",
    y = "Microbe Genus",
    title = "Longitudinal ASV prevalence by rhinitis status",
    subtitle = "Stars: Adjusted p-value within each timepoint"
  )
```
```{r}
#Rarefying for Faith's PD
bootstrap_faith_pd_prune_each_iter <- function(phy, depth = 1000, B = 50, seed = 1,
                                              include.root = FALSE, ci_level = 0.95,
                                              verbose = TRUE) {
  stopifnot(requireNamespace("phyloseq", quietly = TRUE))
  stopifnot(requireNamespace("vegan", quietly = TRUE))
  stopifnot(requireNamespace("picante", quietly = TRUE))
  stopifnot(requireNamespace("ape", quietly = TRUE))
  stopifnot(requireNamespace("dplyr", quietly = TRUE))

  set.seed(seed)

  # Keep only samples with enough depth
  keep <- phyloseq::sample_sums(phy) >= depth
  if (verbose) message("Keeping ", sum(keep), " / ", phyloseq::nsamples(phy), " samples with depth ≥ ", depth)
  phy0 <- phyloseq::prune_samples(keep, phy)

  # OTU table as samples x taxa (counts)
  otu0 <- as(phyloseq::otu_table(phy0), "matrix")
  if (phyloseq::taxa_are_rows(phy0)) otu0 <- t(otu0)

  # Tree must exist
  tree_full <- phyloseq::phy_tree(phy0)
  if (is.null(tree_full)) stop("No phylogenetic tree found in phy_tree(phy). Faith's PD requires a tree.")

  # Ensure OTU taxa match tree tip labels
  # (Drop taxa not in tree, and drop tree tips not in OTU)
  common_taxa <- intersect(colnames(otu0), tree_full$tip.label)
  if (length(common_taxa) < 2) stop("Too few overlapping taxa between OTU table and tree after intersection.")
  otu0 <- otu0[, common_taxa, drop = FALSE]
  tree_full <- ape::keep.tip(tree_full, tip = common_taxa)

  # Sanity: confirm all rows have >= depth
  rs <- rowSums(otu0)
  if (any(rs < depth)) {
    stop("Some samples in otu0 have < depth after filtering; check orientation/data type.")
  }

  samp_ids <- rownames(otu0)
  alpha <- 1 - ci_level
  lo_q <- alpha / 2
  hi_q <- 1 - alpha / 2

  pd_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = B, ncol = nrow(otu0),
                   dimnames = list(paste0("iter_", seq_len(B)), samp_ids))

  # Main loop
  for (b in seq_len(B)) {
    # Rarefy: rows=samples, cols=taxa
    otu_b <- vegan::rrarefy(otu0, sample = depth)

    # ✅ Prune taxa absent in ALL samples this iteration
    keep_taxa <- colSums(otu_b) > 0
    otu_b2 <- otu_b[, keep_taxa, drop = FALSE]

    # Handle pathological case (shouldn't happen, but safe)
    if (ncol(otu_b2) < 2) {
      pd_mat[b, ] <- NA_real_
      next
    }

    # ✅ Prune tree to kept taxa
    tree_b <- ape::keep.tip(tree_full, tip = colnames(otu_b2))

    # Faith PD
   pd_b <- picante::pd(otu_b2, tree_b, include.root = include.root)$PD

# robust alignment
if (!is.null(names(pd_b)) && all(samp_ids %in% names(pd_b))) {
  pd_mat[b, ] <- pd_b[samp_ids]
} else {
  # assume pd_b is in the same order as rows of otu_b2
  pd_mat[b, ] <- as.numeric(pd_b)
}

    if (verbose && (b %% max(1, floor(B/10)) == 0)) message("  Completed ", b, "/", B,
                                                            " (kept taxa this iter: ", ncol(otu_b2), ")")
  }

  # Summaries per sample
 pd_df <- as.data.frame(t(pd_mat)) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "SampleID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Faith_PD_mean = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., dplyr::starts_with("iter_")), na.rm = TRUE),
    Faith_PD_sd   = apply(dplyr::select(., dplyr::starts_with("iter_")), 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE),
    Faith_PD_qlo  = apply(dplyr::select(., dplyr::starts_with("iter_")), 1, quantile,
                          probs = lo_q, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE),
    Faith_PD_qhi  = apply(dplyr::select(., dplyr::starts_with("iter_")), 1, quantile,
                          probs = hi_q, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(SampleID, Faith_PD_mean, Faith_PD_sd, Faith_PD_qlo, Faith_PD_qhi)
  list(
    phy_pruned = phy0,
    pd_by_iter = pd_mat,
    summary = pd_df
  )
 }

res_rarefaction <- bootstrap_faith_pd_prune_each_iter(CANOE_phy_3Runs_noneg, depth = 3000, B = 20, seed = 481516)

faith_summary <- res_rarefaction$summary
summary(res_rarefaction$summary$Faith_PD_sd / res_rarefaction$summary$Faith_PD_mean)
head(faith_summary)

#phy_prev_rarefy_10O_2R <- prevalence_filter(CANOE_phy_3Runs_noneg_rarefy1000, prev_frac = 0.1, min_reads = 2)






# --- set these to your real column names ---
time_col  <- "Group"        # your timepoint column in sam_sub
value_col <- "Faith_PD_mean"   # <-- CHANGE this to your Faith distance column name

timepoints_interest <- c("child - newborn", "child - 4 months", "child - 12 months")

df_long <- sam_sub %>%
  filter(.data[[time_col]] %in% timepoints_interest) %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = factor(.data[[time_col]], levels = timepoints_interest),
    clust_sorensen_2 = factor(clust_sorensen_2, levels = c("1-1","1-2"))
  )

# 1) Add bootstrapped Faith PD to your metadata table
faith_summary <- res_rarefaction$summary  # has SampleID + Faith_PD_mean/SD/CI

df_long <- sam_sub %>%
  mutate(SampleID = rownames(.)) %>%                 # or your actual sample ID column
  left_join(faith_summary, by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(.data[[time_col]] %in% timepoints_interest) %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = factor(.data[[time_col]], levels = timepoints_interest),
    clust_sorensen_2 = factor(clust_sorensen_2, levels = c("1-1","1-2"))
  )



# 1) Summary for plotting (mean ± SE)
sum_df <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Timepoint, clust_sorensen_2) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(.data[[value_col]])),
    mean = mean(.data[[value_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
    sd   = sd(.data[[value_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
    se   = sd / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 2) Cross-sectional p-values at each timepoint (Wilcoxon rank-sum)
p_df <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Timepoint) %>%
  wilcox_test(reformulate("clust_sorensen_2", response = value_col)) %>%
  mutate(
    stars = case_when(
      p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    sum_df %>%
      group_by(Timepoint) %>%
      summarise(y = max(mean + se, na.rm = TRUE), .groups="drop"),
    by = "Timepoint"
  ) %>%
  mutate(y = y * 1.08)

# 3) Plot
ggplot(sum_df, aes(x = Timepoint, y = mean, group = clust_sorensen_2, color = clust_sorensen_2)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.15) +
 geom_text(
  data = p_df,
  aes(x = Timepoint, y = y, label = stars),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  size = 6,
  fontface = "bold"
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("1-1" = "#006400", "1-2" = "#D41159")) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Faith's phylogenetic distance",
    color = "Trajectory",
    title = "Longitudinal Faith's phylogenetic distance",
    #subtitle = "Cross-sectional Wilcoxon p-values at each timepoint (1-1 vs 1-2)"
  ) + 
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),

    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, margin = margin(t = 12)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16, margin = margin(r = 12)),

    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 14),

    plot.title   = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle= element_text(size = 14, color = "grey30"),

    panel.grid   = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# change this to your exact column name if needed
outcome_col <- "Chronic_Rhinitis_12m"

df_hm <- df_plot_Boruta %>%
  filter(ASV == "ASV_15") %>%
  mutate(
    present = as.integer(RelAbund > 0),
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Newborn", "4 months", "12 months"))
  ) %>%
  # keep one row per Subject_ID x Group (in case of duplicates)
  group_by(Subject_ID, Group) %>%
  summarise(
    present = max(present, na.rm = TRUE),
    Chronic_Rhinitis_12m = dplyr::first(.data[[outcome_col]]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Chronic_Rhinitis_12m))

# Order participants by outcome (then by overall presence as a tie-breaker)
subj_order <- df_hm %>%
  group_by(Subject_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    Chronic_Rhinitis_12m = first(Chronic_Rhinitis_12m),
    total_present = sum(present, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Chronic_Rhinitis_12m, desc(total_present)) %>%
  pull(Subject_ID)

df_hm <- df_hm %>%
  mutate(Subject_ID = factor(Subject_ID, levels = subj_order))

ggplot(df_hm, aes(x = Group, y = Subject_ID, fill = factor(present))) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  facet_grid(Chronic_Rhinitis_12m ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "grey90", "1" = "black"),
                    name = "ASV_15",
                    labels = c("Absent", "Present")) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.25, "lines")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Timepoint",
    y = "Participants (sorted)",
    title = "ASV_15 presence/absence by participant, sorted by chronic rhinitis status"
  )


#All ASVs in one plot for change in rel. abund.
ggplot(df_plot_Boruta, aes(x = Group, y = RelAbund)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) +
  geom_jitter(aes(group = Subject_ID),
              width = 0.12, alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(group = Subject_ID,
                color = chronic_rhinitis12m),
            alpha = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ ASV, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Timepoint (Group)",
       y = "Relative abundance (TSS)",
       color = "Trajectory")


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

df_plot_Boruta %>%
  filter(ASV == "ASV_57") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Group, y = RelAbund)) +
  
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, fill = "grey90", color = "grey50") +
  
  geom_jitter(
    aes(
      group = Subject_ID,
      color = chronic_rhinitis12m
    ),
    width = 0.12,
    alpha = 0.6,
    size = 1.5
  ) +
  
  geom_line(
    aes(
      group = Subject_ID,
      color = chronic_rhinitis12m
    ),
    alpha = 0.5
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1)
  ) +
  
  theme_bw() +
  
  labs(
    x = "Timepoint (Group)",
    y = "Relative abundance (TSS)",
    color = "Chronic Rhinitis"
  )





make_asv_presence_heatmap <- function(df,
                                      asv = "ASV_57",
                                      outcome_col,
                                      group_col = "Group",
                                      subject_col = "Subject_ID",
                                      relabund_col = "RelAbund",
                                      group_levels = c("Newborn", "4 months", "12 months"),
                                      group_labels = group_levels,
                                      sort_outcome_levels = NULL,
                                      colors = c("0" = "grey90", "1" = "black"),
                                      show_subject_ids = FALSE,
                                      title = NULL) {

  stopifnot(is.data.frame(df))
  stopifnot(all(c("ASV", outcome_col, group_col, subject_col, relabund_col) %in% colnames(df)))

  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)

  # ----------------------------
  # Build base heatmap dataframe
  # ----------------------------
  df_hm <- df %>%
    filter(.data$ASV == asv) %>%
    mutate(
      present = as.integer(.data[[relabund_col]] > 0),
      !!group_col := factor(.data[[group_col]],
                            levels = group_levels,
                            labels = group_labels)
    ) %>%
    group_by(.data[[subject_col]], .data[[group_col]]) %>%
    summarise(
      present = max(present, na.rm = TRUE),
      outcome = first(.data[[outcome_col]]),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(outcome))

  # Outcome ordering
  if (!is.null(sort_outcome_levels)) {
    df_hm <- df_hm %>%
      mutate(outcome = factor(outcome, levels = sort_outcome_levels))
  } else {
    df_hm <- df_hm %>% mutate(outcome = factor(outcome))
  }

  # ----------------------------
  # Order subjects (y-axis)
  # ----------------------------
  subj_order <- df_hm %>%
    group_by(.data[[subject_col]]) %>%
    summarise(
      outcome = first(outcome),
      total_present = sum(present, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(outcome, desc(total_present)) %>%
    pull(.data[[subject_col]])

  df_hm <- df_hm %>%
    mutate(!!subject_col := factor(.data[[subject_col]], levels = subj_order))

  # ----------------------------
  # % present labels per facet × age
  # ----------------------------
  df_pct <- df_hm %>%
    group_by(outcome, .data[[group_col]]) %>%
    summarise(
      n_present = sum(present),
      n_total   = n(),
      pct       = 100 * n_present / n_total,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      label = sprintf("%d%%", round(pct)),
      y = Inf   # place at top of each facet
    )

  if (is.null(title)) {
    title <- paste0(asv, " presence/absence (% present) across ages")
  }

  # ----------------------------
  # Plot
  # ----------------------------
  ggplot(df_hm, aes(x = .data[[group_col]],
                    y = .data[[subject_col]],
                    fill = factor(present))) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
    facet_grid(outcome ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
    geom_text(
      data = df_pct,
      aes(x = .data[[group_col]], y = y, label = label),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      vjust = 1.3,
      size = 3.2
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = colors,
      name = asv,
      labels = c("Absent", "Present")
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.spacing.y = grid::unit(0.25, "lines"),
      axis.text.y = if (show_subject_ids) element_text(size = 6) else element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = if (show_subject_ids) element_line() else element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Age",
      y = "Participants (sorted)",
      title = title
    )
}


make_asv_presence_heatmap(
  df_plot_Boruta,
  asv = "ASV_57",
  outcome_col = "Chronic_Rhinitis_12m"
)



library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

asv_to_genus <- c(
  "ASV_335" = "Dermacoccaceae",
  "ASV_57"  = "Moraxella_57",
  "ASV_15"  = "Moraxella_15",
  "ASV_25"  = "Moraxella_25",
  "ASV_83"  = "Streptococcus_83",
  "ASV_73"  = "Lactococcus_73",
  "ASV_169" = "Actinobacteria_169",
  "ASV_32"  = "Streptococcus_32"
)



# ASVs of interest (as in df_plot_Boruta$ASV)
asvs <- paste0("ASV_", c(335, 57, 15, 25, 83, 73, 169, 32))

# 1) Build wide presence/absence matrix per sample
pa_wide <- df_plot_Boruta %>%
  filter(ASV %in% asvs) %>%
  mutate(present = as.integer(RelAbund > 0)) %>%
  group_by(SampleID, ASV) %>%                       # if you don't have SampleID, use rownames you created earlier
  summarise(present = max(present, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = ASV, values_from = present, values_fill = 0)

# 2) Pairwise Fisher test → log OR + p-values
pairs <- combn(asvs, 2, simplify = FALSE)

pair_stats <- lapply(pairs, function(p) {
  a <- p[1]; b <- p[2]
  tab <- table(pa_wide[[a]], pa_wide[[b]])

  # fisher test can fail if table is degenerate; handle safely
  ft <- tryCatch(fisher.test(tab), error = function(e) NULL)

  data.frame(
    ASV1 = a,
    ASV2 = b,
    odds_ratio = if (!is.null(ft)) unname(ft$estimate) else NA_real_,
    p_value = if (!is.null(ft)) ft$p.value else NA_real_
  )
}) %>% bind_rows() %>%
  mutate(
    log_or = log(odds_ratio),
    fdr = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),
    sig = fdr < 0.01
  )

# 3) Make a symmetric matrix for plotting
mat_df <- pair_stats %>%
  select(ASV1, ASV2, log_or, sig, fdr) %>%
  bind_rows(
    pair_stats %>% transmute(ASV1 = ASV2, ASV2 = ASV1, log_or, sig, fdr)
  ) %>%
  # add diagonal
  bind_rows(data.frame(ASV1 = asvs, ASV2 = asvs, log_or = 0, sig = FALSE, fdr = NA_real_)) %>%
  mutate(
    ASV1 = factor(ASV1, levels = asvs),
    ASV2 = factor(ASV2, levels = asvs)
  )

# 3b) Relabel ASVs to Genus
mat_df <- mat_df %>%
  mutate(
    ASV1_label = ifelse(ASV1 %in% names(asv_to_genus),
                        asv_to_genus[ASV1],
                        ASV1),
    ASV2_label = ifelse(ASV2 %in% names(asv_to_genus),
                        asv_to_genus[ASV2],
                        ASV2)
  )
label_levels <- unname(asv_to_genus[asvs])

mat_df <- mat_df %>%
  mutate(
    ASV1_label = factor(ASV1_label, levels = label_levels),
    ASV2_label = factor(ASV2_label, levels = label_levels)
  )



# 4) Plot heatmap using the label columns
ggplot(mat_df, aes(x = ASV1_label, y = ASV2_label, fill = log_or)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(mat_df, sig & ASV1 != ASV2),
    aes(x = ASV1_label, y = ASV2_label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 1.6
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(midpoint = 0, name = "log(OR)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = NULL,
    title = "ASV co-occurrence (presence/absence)",
    subtitle = "log(odds ratio) from Fisher's exact test; dots indicate FDR < 0.01"
  )



library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

make_asv_violin_2x3_TSS_present <- function(df,
                                            asv = "ASV_57",
                                            outcome_col,
                                            group_col = "Group",
                                            subject_col = "Subject_ID",
                                            relabund_col = "RelAbund",
                                            group_levels = c("Newborn", "4 months", "12 months"),
                                            group_labels = group_levels,
                                            title = NULL) {

  stopifnot(all(c("ASV", outcome_col, group_col, subject_col, relabund_col) %in% colnames(df)))

  dat <- df %>%
    filter(ASV == asv) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[outcome_col]])) %>%
    filter(.data[[relabund_col]] > 0) %>%          # <-- remove zeros
    mutate(
      outcome = factor(.data[[outcome_col]]),
      !!group_col := factor(.data[[group_col]],
                            levels = group_levels,
                            labels = group_labels)
    )

  if (is.null(title)) {
    title <- paste0(asv, " relative abundance among carriers")
  }

  ggplot(dat, aes(x = !!sym(group_col), y = .data[[relabund_col]])) +
    facet_grid(outcome ~ .) +   # 2 rows (outcome), 3 columns via x
    geom_violin(trim = FALSE) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.12, alpha = 0.6, size = 1.3) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1)) +
    labs(
      x = "Age",
      y = "Relative abundance (TSS, % among present)",
      title = title
    )
}


make_asv_violin_2x3_TSS_present(
  df_plot_Boruta,
  asv = "ASV_57",
  outcome_col = "Chronic_Rhinitis_12m"
)

```

```{r}
### Trying Co-occurrance relationship for the ASVs from Boruta using relative abundances, not just presence absence ###

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

asvs <- paste0("ASV_", c(335, 57, 15, 25, 83, 73, 169, 32))

ra_wide <- df_plot_Boruta %>%
  filter(ASV %in% asvs) %>%
  group_by(SampleID, ASV) %>%
  summarise(RelAbund = mean(RelAbund, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = ASV, values_from = RelAbund, values_fill = 0)


pairs <- combn(asvs, 2, simplify = FALSE)

pair_stats <- lapply(pairs, function(p) {
  a <- p[1]; b <- p[2]

  ct <- suppressWarnings(
    cor.test(ra_wide[[a]], ra_wide[[b]], method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)
  )

  data.frame(
    ASV1 = a,
    ASV2 = b,
    rho = unname(ct$estimate),
    p_value = ct$p.value
  )
}) %>%
  bind_rows() %>%
  mutate(
    fdr = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),
    sig = fdr < 0.01
  )

mat_df <- pair_stats %>%
  select(ASV1, ASV2, rho, sig, fdr) %>%
  bind_rows(
    pair_stats %>% transmute(ASV1 = ASV2, ASV2 = ASV1, rho, sig, fdr)
  ) %>%
  bind_rows(data.frame(ASV1 = asvs, ASV2 = asvs, rho = 1, sig = FALSE, fdr = NA_real_)) %>%
  mutate(
    ASV1 = factor(ASV1, levels = asvs),
    ASV2 = factor(ASV2, levels = asvs)
  )

library(stringr)

label_levels_raw <- unname(asv_to_genus[asvs])

italicize_genus <- function(x) {
  # x like "Moraxella_335" → "<i>Moraxella</i>_335"
  genus <- str_replace(x, "_.*$", "")
  suffix <- str_replace(x, "^[^_]+", "")  # keeps "_335"
  paste0("<i>", genus, "</i>", suffix)
}

label_levels_md <- vapply(label_levels_raw, italicize_genus, character(1))

mat_df <- mat_df %>%
  mutate(
    ASV1_label = ifelse(ASV1 %in% names(asv_to_genus), asv_to_genus[ASV1], ASV1),
    ASV2_label = ifelse(ASV2 %in% names(asv_to_genus), asv_to_genus[ASV2], ASV2),
    ASV1_label = factor(ASV1_label, levels = label_levels_raw),
    ASV2_label = factor(ASV2_label, levels = label_levels_raw)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ASV1_label_md = factor(label_levels_md[match(ASV1_label, label_levels_raw)], levels = label_levels_md),
    ASV2_label_md = factor(label_levels_md[match(ASV2_label, label_levels_raw)], levels = label_levels_md)
  )

library(ggplot2)
library(ggtext)

correlation_matrix <- ggplot(mat_df, aes(x = ASV1_label_md, y = ASV2_label_md, fill = rho)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(mat_df, sig & ASV1 != ASV2),
    aes(x = ASV1_label_md, y = ASV2_label_md),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 2.2    # slightly larger dots too (optional)
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(midpoint = 0, name = "Spearman ρ", limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = ggtext::element_markdown(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      size = 14        # ⬅ increase ASV label size
    ),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(
      size = 14        # ⬅ increase ASV label size
    ),
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 18,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 14
    ),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = NULL,
    title = "ASV Co-occurrence within CANOE Cohort",
    subtitle = "Spearman correlation (ρ); dots indicate FDR < 0.01"
  )





library(lme4)
library(dplyr)

boruta_asvs <- paste0("ASV_", c(335, 57, 15, 25, 83, 73, 169, 32))


meta_boruta_df <- sam_sub %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  transmute(
    SampleID,
    Site = canoe_site,
    Sex = sex
  )


df_all_boruta <- df_plot_Boruta %>%
  left_join(meta_boruta_df, by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(chronic_rhinitis12m)) %>%
  mutate(
    Site = factor(Site),
    Sex = factor(Sex),
    RelAbund_log = log10(RelAbund + 1e-6)
  )


results_glmm <- lapply(boruta_asvs, function(a) {

  tmp <- df_all_boruta %>% filter(ASV == a)

  fit <- glmer(
    chronic_rhinitis12m ~ RelAbund + Site + Sex + (1 | Subject_ID),
    data = tmp,
    family = binomial,
    control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa")
  )

  beta <- fixef(fit)["RelAbund"]
  se <- sqrt(diag(vcov(fit)))["RelAbund"]

  data.frame(
    ASV = a,
    beta = beta,
    OR = exp(beta),
    p_value = 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(beta / se)))
  )
}) %>%
  bind_rows() %>%
  mutate(
    fdr = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),
    direction = case_when(
      beta > 0 ~ "Risk-associated",
      beta < 0 ~ "Protective",
      TRUE ~ "Neutral"
    )
  )



#Rel_Abund_Pct

results_glmm <- lapply(boruta_asvs, function(a) {

  tmp <- df_all_boruta %>%
    filter(ASV == a) %>%
    mutate(RelAbund_pct = RelAbund * 100)

  fit <- tryCatch(
    glmer(
      chronic_rhinitis12m ~ RelAbund_pct + Site + Sex + (1 | Subject_ID),
      data = tmp,
      family = binomial,
      control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(fit)) {
    return(data.frame(
      ASV = a, beta = NA_real_, OR = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  beta <- unname(fixef(fit)["RelAbund_pct"])
  se   <- unname(sqrt(diag(vcov(fit)))["RelAbund_pct"])

  z <- beta / se
  p <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(z)))

  data.frame(
    ASV = a,
    beta = beta,
    OR = exp(beta),
    p_value = p
  )
}) %>%
  bind_rows() %>%
  mutate(
    fdr = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),
    direction = case_when(
      is.na(beta) ~ NA_character_,
      beta > 0 ~ "Risk-associated",
      beta < 0 ~ "Protective",
      TRUE ~ "Neutral"
    )
  )
results_glmm


```
